summary: Integrated ADR 0264 on synchronized main release 0.177.84 by rebasing onto origin/main commit 2efaafb20c4f7d412fdbe821216493fa68d6bc53, partitioning repository validation into failure-domain-isolated lanes, hardening Windmill schedule sync plus worker-checkout integrity on the exact-main replay path, and proving the worker-local post-merge fallback can recover from real runner-image pull failures while platform version 0.130.58 records both the build-server and worker validation evidence.

verification.check: Latest origin/main baseline and protected release cut
verification.observed: `git fetch origin --prune` confirmed the newest published `origin/main` baseline had advanced to commit `2efaafb20c4f7d412fdbe821216493fa68d6bc53`; the exact-main ADR 0264 replay source was the rebased commit `5ce5deae525879610a61c9065a63e951a21bc968` on top of that head, and the protected release cut carried repository version `0.177.84`.

`uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_validation_lanes.py tests/test_validation_gate.py tests/test_validation_gate_windmill.py tests/test_validate_repo_cache.py tests/test_parallel_check.py tests/test_workstream_surface_ownership.py tests/test_config_merge_repo_surfaces.py tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py tests/test_post_merge_gate.py` returned `72 passed in 4.78s`; after the final worker-fallback hardening, `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_post_merge_gate.py tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py tests/test_config_merge_repo_surfaces.py` returned `24 passed in 1.85s`.

verification.check: Exact-main Windmill replay and build-server validation
verification.observed: The exact-main `playbooks/windmill.yml --limit docker-runtime-lv3` replay surfaced and then re-verified the schedule-sync dependency fix, worker-checkout integrity sentinels, and gitless worker-fallback split, finishing successfully with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=251 changed=49 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=33 rescued=0 ignored=0`; `make pre-push-gate` then passed on the rebased exact-main tree with all blocking checks green across the selected lanes `documentation-and-adr`, `repository-structure-and-schema`, `generated-artifact-and-canonical-truth`, `service-syntax-and-unit`, `remote-builder`, and `live-apply-and-promotion`, and `make remote-validate` passed with the focused lanes `repository-structure-and-schema`, `generated-artifact-and-canonical-truth`, and `service-syntax-and-unit`.

verification.check: Worker mirror integrity recovery and direct status checks
verification.observed: When the worker mirror at `/srv/proxmox_florin_server` still lacked exact-worktree ADR 0264 files after replay, a bounded refresh of the rebased validation surfaces plus removal of `/opt/windmill/worker-checkout.sha256` restored alignment; after removing macOS `._*` artifacts from the manual tar transfer and restoring `ops:ops` ownership on the worker checkout, `/usr/local/bin/uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --write` refreshed worker canonical truth, `python3 config/windmill/scripts/gate-status.py --repo-path /srv/proxmox_florin_server` returned `status: ok`, and the final `python3 config/windmill/scripts/post-merge-gate.py --repo-path /srv/proxmox_florin_server` returned `status: ok` while running `./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-vars role-argument-specs json alert-rules generated-docs generated-portals` plus `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/provider_boundary_catalog.py --validate` with both commands returning `0`.

On the integrated `0.177.84` tree, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models workstream-surfaces agent-standards` and `git diff --check` both passed after canonical truth, ADR index, diagrams, and platform manifest regeneration. `make gate-status` reported the rebased build-server gate run passed at `2026-03-29T17:46:10Z` and the first local post-merge gate run passed at `2026-03-29T17:55:49Z`. A later controller-local `make post-merge-gate` replay on the wrapper-only follow-up timed out only `yaml-lint` at `120s` while every other check passed, so the patch itself was closed by the focused pytest slice plus the fresh worker-local `post-merge-gate.py` replay at `2026-03-29T18:02:34Z`.

notes: This receipt establishes `validation_gate` as a dedicated capability receipt so the exact-main lane-partitioning proof does not overwrite the broader `remote_build_gateway` and `windmill` receipts owned by adjacent ADRs.

The latest-main replay uncovered three worker-path issues that are now part of the canonical ADR 0264 implementation: repo-managed Windmill schedule sync must supply `pyyaml`, gitless worker mirrors must not attempt git-dependent fallback stages, and the wrapper must also fall back when `run_gate.py` reports structured Docker startup failures through check returncode `125`.

One bounded manual worker refresh was required during this live apply because the mirrored checkout remained stale after a successful replay; the exact recovery steps are now documented in `docs/runbooks/validation-gate.md` for future operators.

The second controller-local `make post-merge-gate` replay after the final wrapper patch exposed a host-local `yaml-lint` timeout at `120s`; because the change only affected worker fallback detection, the authoritative green proof for that follow-up patch is the focused pytest slice plus the final worker-local replay.
